positive: A geometric and minimalist illustration of a celestial fox spirit (kitsune) leaping among stylized constellations. The composition should feature a central, elegantly curved silhouette of the fox against a deep indigo and sapphire blue gradient background. Include geometric abstract elements like glowing interconnected lines, stylized lunar phases, and minimalist stellar clusters in gold and metallic silver ink. The art style should be vector-graphic inspired, modern tattoo flash, and high-contrast screen print art, emphasizing clean lines and negative space. Full body view of the fox, dynamic pose, central framing, suitable for apparel printing, high resolution, vibrant color palette, smooth gradients, detailed line work, isometric perspective.
